markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, align on strategy, and plan for renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LLM Visibility Surges:** Imubit's presence in LLM responses jumped to 4% coverage (as of Jan 16), surpassing competitors for key prompts like "industrial process optimization."](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**New Success Metrics:** The focus is shifting from vanity metrics (e.g., traffic) to business impact: industry-specific reach (e.g., Chem, LNG) and content-driven lead conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Integrated GTM Strategy:** A new demand gen agency will use GrowthX's keyword research and top-performing content to power paid ads and outbound campaigns, creating a unified GTM effort.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**AI Summary Experiment:** Imubit is adding on-page AI summaries to articles to prime LLMs for better citations and signal its AI-native identity to readers.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Topics

### Performance & LLM Visibility

  - [**Editorial Cadence:** 7 articles/week (4 net new, 3 refreshed) to leverage existing content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Traffic & Engagement:** Sessions are climbing, and user engagement is trending up from \~50%.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Growth:** Presence in LLM responses jumped to 4% coverage (as of Jan 16), surpassing competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Example:** Perplexity cited Imubit for the prompt "How can AI-driven optimization contribute to measurable ROI in industrial operations?"](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX is replacing "Scrunch" with a proprietary LLM visibility tool, which will grant Imubit direct access to track performance against competitors like Rockwell Automation.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Content Strategy & New Metrics

  - [**New Content Clusters:** \~25 new assignments are in production across three strategic clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Empowering the Workforce](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Industrial AI & Digital Transformation](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Sustainability, Safety, & Compliance](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**AI Summary Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Format:** An on-page "AI Summary" (not a click-to-expand) is being added to all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
          - [**SEO:** Primes LLMs with context for better citations.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
          - [**UX:** Signals Imubit's AI-native identity and provides a quick "too long to read" option.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Tracking:** GrowthX will monitor engagement metrics (scroll depth, time on page) to measure impact.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### GTM Integration & Renewal

  - [**New Demand Gen Agency:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Role:** Drive holistic demand gen (paid ads, outbound campaigns).](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [**Integration Goal:** Create a unified GTM strategy by syncing GrowthX's organic work with the new agency's efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [**Renewal Planning:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Timeline:** The contract renewal is April 27th.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**QBR:** The next Quarterly Business Review is rescheduled for two weeks from now (Jan 29th) to accommodate Tara's travel.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Share the new content assignment link with Tara.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Reschedule the QBR for two weeks from now (Jan 29th).](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
      - [Prepare for the QBR by aligning on new success metrics (industry reach, lead conversions).](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [Monitor engagement metrics for articles with the new AI summary.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on new content assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with the new demand gen agency to sync keyword research and content promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/LRzP6ycstty3mna3dm8-UbmBBR2Q8S7D?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
